scope: CyberLACE live mathematical blackboard with typewriter effect
changes: Added cyberlaceMathWriter state and board ref.
Added live typewriter loop for CyberLACE math rows.
Moved math board to the top of the red CyberLACE modal.
Added fixed-height blackboard with internal scroll and blinking cursor.
Kept green safe-guidance modal and backend runtime unchanged.
visualBehavior: Modal opens with Pizarra matematica en vivo.
Equations are typed one line at a time.
Board auto-scrolls internally without stretching the whole modal.
Cursor blinks while the current equation is being written.
